# Vibration

**Summary**: The periodic motion of drill string components, categorized as axial, torsional, or lateral.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-al-dahmoush|Al-Dahmoush, 2022]] investigated the impact of vibration on tool life and ROP in abrasive formations.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-al-dahmoush|Al-Dahmoush, 2022]] High vibration leads to tool failure and reduced ROP.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods



## Key Findings Across Sources

- Lateral vibrations were identified as a major contributor to nonproductive time (NPT). ([[2022-al-dahmoush|Al-Dahmoush, 2022, p. 14]])
